series_metadata.series_description: Documents provided by a regulated entity notifying Ohio EPA of compliance with Ohio environmental laws, including Cessation of Regulated Operations notifications, Asbestos Removal notifications, Notices of Intent to Fill, Handler Notifications, and MACT Notifications. This schedule does not include permit related compliance notifications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 10 years or until scanned. ; Electronic: 10 years., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
